Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Compulsory X-Complaint For Property Damage
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: nathan n. wang, esq., aaa legal department/macmorris & carbone, 510.267.7200, for defendant tony rodriguez; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TONY RODRIGUEZ's Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Compulsory cross-Complaint For Property Damage is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
